name: Noisy plant ignored safety tests—strong case?

mainEntity.name: Noisy plant ignored safety tests—strong case?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Very strong; missing noise assessments prove negligence under OSHA.**

Lack of records supports unprotected exposure.[1][3]

**Key factors:**
- No conservation program.
- Decibel estimates.
- Universal coworker risk.
- Your audiogram.

Attorney demands internal docs.[2] High win odds.

Violations bolster claims.
